title: phi-scaling-validator: Phi^(1/3) Universal Scaling Validator (GenesisAeon P38)
description: Cross-domain validation of the Phi^(1/3) ~= 1.174 universal scaling exponent across GenesisAeon Packages P17-P37. Tests beta-cluster ratios (78 threshold systems), CREP Spectrum spacing (P17-P30), Q4 entropy landscape, and EML operator tree depth ratios. Package 38 of the GenesisAeon entropy atlas. Includes honest statistical tests (one-sample t-test + bootstrap CI) with explicit null hypothesis (Uniform(1.0, 1.5)) and falsification conditions.
notes: GenesisAeon Package 38. Part of the entropy atlas P17-P38. DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.17472834. Built with Python 3.11+, scipy, numpy, typer.
